title: Senior Teacher - Udemy India Asia Pacific Associates - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Udemy India Asia Pacific Associates - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
We at Udemy India Asia Pacific Associates are looking for an experienced Senior Teacher based out of Aurangabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Udemy India Asia Pacific Associates:
Udemy India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Udemy India Asia Pacific Associates!
